projetos.descricaoResumida: Technical challenge developed for a recruitment process.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A web application developed as a technical challenge using React and Vite. The project features an interactive map integrated with the Leaflet API, allowing users to asynchronously search for addresses by consuming the Nominatim public API (OpenStreetMap) via React Query to optimize caching, loading states, and error handling. The application's architecture leverages a robust global state management system implemented through the Context API, which centralizes location and favorites data while sharing essential functions across components. Key developed features include dynamic map click capture with animated visual transitions, coordinate validation within the form to save custom locations, and an interactive favorites list supporting camera redirection to the selected point or record deletion.

projetos.descricaoResumida: E-commerce platform featuring multi-branch management, dynamic menus, and a loyalty system.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Developed as the final capstone project for the Analysis and Systems Development degree. This platform simulates a fictional retail network showcasing its headquarters and regional branches. Each location features a dynamic menu providing a complete shopping experience, allowing users to manage a cart, simulate payment methods, and earn or redeem loyalty points for discounts.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Real-time camera monitoring system for truck detection using computer vision.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This project is a real-time camera monitoring system designed to detect trucks using the YOLOv8 model. The system connects to an RTSP camera feed and processes video frames to identify trucks within specific monitored zones. It captures images and logs detections with timestamps for analytical tracking, with ongoing work to specialize detection for fuel tankers.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Desktop dashboard displaying real-time financial quotes with integrated charting and exports.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A desktop analytical tool developed to fetch and monitor real-time foreign exchange rates (USD, EUR, GBP) and cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH). Utilizing PyQt5, the application connects to external REST APIs, populates dynamic tracking tables, renders market distribution charts using Matplotlib, and allows historical data exports to CSV.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Desktop application for querying real-time company product and open card records.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A production-grade desktop application developed to query live information regarding products and open cards for an active enterprise. Built using Electron for the frontend and Flask for the backend, the application securely interacts with a PostgreSQL database, providing a responsive interface crafted with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projetos.descricaoResumida: 2D cooperative arcade game built in Python with local database high-score integration.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A retro 2D arcade shooter built from scratch using the Pygame framework. The game features timed level transitions, dynamic asset rendering, full local 2-player cooperative multiplayer support, and integrates an SQLite3 database backend to persist player high-scores and sessions.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Web application featuring dynamic health calculators developed as a university extension project.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A public-facing health platform created as part of a university academic extension initiative. The application aims to foster healthy eating habits by providing interactive tools, comprehensive food database tracking resources, dynamic wellness calculators, and direct communication conduits to licensed nutritionists.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Desktop application integrating the Google Maps API to calculate distances between Brazilian cities.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A functional desktop application built with Python and PyQt5 to calculate distances between cities across Brazil utilizing the Google Maps Distance Matrix API. It features multi-city processing capabilities, real-time calculation progress bars, thread interruption handling, and exports complete route datasets directly into CSV and SQLite structures.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Collection of peer-reviewed technical articles and academic documentation engineered in LaTeX.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A curated repository gathering technical research papers written during undergraduate studies. Documented using LaTeX and Overleaf, the papers cover software quality models, component-based engineering, and GPU architectures. This acts as a documentation portfolio demonstrating advanced skills in structured writing and technical communication.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Automation tool for batch-querying corporate data via the Brazilian Federal Revenue API.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A Python backend utility optimized to automate bulk data extraction from the Brazilian Federal Revenue public REST API. To respect free-tier rate limits (3 requests/min), the script implements an automated throttling timer, seamlessly iterating through large dataset files to output structured corporate information (company names, cities, states) for accounting workflows.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Workflow automation utility that generates high-resolution barcodes bundled into printable documents.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: An internal automation script designed to eliminate manual data entry and warehouse operational bottlenecks caused by corrupted or unreachable inventory tags. The Python program processes bulk numeric inputs, generates standard Code 128 barcodes, and automatically formats them into a clean desktop-ready DOCX file optimized for direct office printing.
Project developed to simulate a registration page that provides users with the option to generate a secure and random password.

projetos.descricaoResumida: QR Code generator built with HTML, CSS, and JS.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: A webpage created during Udemy's Full Front-End course, designed to generate QR codes from entered text or URLs by consuming a QR code generation API.

projetos.descricaoResumida: A clone of the Instagram home page.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Project developed during Udemy's Full Front-End course to create a clone of the Instagram home page.
